---
name: Usability feedback
about: Report a confusing or failed BaseBrief workflow
title: "[Usability] "
labels: usability
assignees: ""
---

## Safety Check

Do not include secrets, credentials, private project content, or private local paths. Replace sensitive details with public-safe placeholders.

## Goal

What were you trying to accomplish?

## Entry Point

Which path did you use?

- Skill-first Full or Lite
- Quickstart build and check
- Integrated Handoff Golden Path
- Adapter export
- Seal/Diff
- Other public BaseBrief workflow

## Tool And Environment

Which AI tool and Node.js version did you use?

## Steps

List the smallest public-safe reproduction steps.

## Expected Result

What did you expect?

## Actual Result

What happened instead?

## Friction Or Failure

Which step was confusing, noisy, or blocked?
